notes: Focused tranche-transfer artifact distill train split built from phase5a_hard_trace_freeze_v2.
Small out-of-tranche dev split with KB-v3 official and kv hard near-miss examples.
Focused refresh after distill_v3 failed to transfer from the three-task decision surface to the broader Phase 5A tranche.
Hypothesis: the failure is partly a curriculum and split problem because sum_reduction was previously only in dev and routing_argmax_hard had too little weight in train.
This run biases training directly toward the four-task tranche targets before trying another broader learner comparison.
